raw_request: Provide the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9, including the measurement definition and period used.
intent: The disclosed release rule requires bot-adjusted 30-day retention of at least 10%, so the raw 12% dashboard value is not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9 only; bot-adjusted 30-day retention for the decision-relevant cohort or reporting period.
expected_value_basis: A verified value at or above 10% would satisfy the retention threshold, while a value below 10% would rule out release regardless of the raw dashboard rate.
